mapper.body: {"model":"gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a customer support classifier. Analyze the customer message and respond ONLY with a JSON object containing these fields: detected_language, english_translation, intent_category (one of: FAQ, billing, technical, complaint, escalation), urgency (one of: low, medium, high). Respond with ONLY the JSON."},{"role":"user","content":"{{trim(5.clean_message)}}"}],"temperature":0.1}

mapper.body: {"model":"gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a helpful customer support agent. Use ONLY the provided context to answer. If unsure say you will escalate to a human agent. Be friendly and concise. Respond in the same language the customer wrote in. Context: {{11.data.matches[1].metadata.text}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{trim(stripHTML(5.clean_message))}}"}],"temperature":0.3}
